summary:
DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon recounts visions and warnings about upcoming terrorist acts targeting American infrastructure and public gatherings, specifically mentioning shopping malls, Christmas tree-lighting ceremonies, and Black Friday events. He details underground chatter and secret networks operating with specific SIM cards across cities like Chicago, Seattle, Boston, and New York. Brandon describes a complex web of organized crime, cartels, and gang activity involving MS-13 and the mafia infiltrating law enforcement agencies such as the NYPD. He explains that these criminal networks are being used as a host by foreign Islamic brotherhood groups to smuggle supplies through international shipping containers, particularly noting transit routes from Japan, Venezuela, Mexico, and Cuba into major United States cities and ports.

POLITICAL FIGURES AND GOVERNMENT INFILTRATION: Brandon discusses visions concerning political leaders, primarily focusing on Donald Trump and his administration. He describes a vision for 2025 where Trump acts as a lion tamer cracking a whip at a bear (representing Russia) and a dragon (representing China) to bring a temporary season of peace. Brandon notes that there are internal leaks and informants, referring to them as rats, embedded within the Pentagon, the FBI, and the Department of Homeland Security. He states that Trump will need heightened discernment regarding his inner circle. Additional political figures mentioned include JD Vance, Pete Hegseth, Ron DeSantis, and Pam Bondi, with Brandon noting that Bondi is preparing to make a major announcement to expose hidden criminal networks.

ANGELIC ENCOUNTERS AND PROPHETIC VISIONS: Brandon details an extensive encounter with an archangel who appeared before him holding a lightning-bolt sword adorned with glowing emeralds and a horn draped with a royalty flag. The angel delivered a message emphasizing that faith works by love. Additionally, Brandon shares visions of a dragon emerging from rocks to consume ocean water, and a storm approaching a location he identifies as Mystery Babylon, which he correlates with New York City. He also mentions seeing Timothy McVeigh-style attacks involving fertilizer in trucks and trains, and warns of a planned mass event in Honolulu, Hawaii, designed to demonstrate the reach of these covert cells.

GLOBAL TERRORISM WARNINGS: Brandon outlines imminent threats directed at international locations, particularly emphasizing Western nations. He states that simultaneous attacks are being planned for France and England, targeting transportation systems, cafes, and holiday markets. He also describes threats against the Vatican during the Pope's first mass and attacks on Catholic churches across Europe and the Middle East. Brandon shares a specific vision of a suspect wearing a white gown, a white and gold headpiece, and a black backpack, who intends to carry out a suicide bombing on a subway system.

UPCOMING SPIRITUAL REVIVAL: Brandon reports that a significant spiritual outpouring and the return of tent revivals are imminent. He references past religious figures like Oral Roberts, Jack Coe, and Kenneth Hagin, stating that the current generation will experience an unprecedented move of God's presence. Locations such as Oral Roberts University, Collinsville, and various churches are highlighted as epicenters for this upcoming revival.
rawData: [November 27, 2025]-[Praying for America]-[https://youtu.be/GJwNDkJKR1w]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. It's Brandon and Diana, the Dynamic Duo. We're here and we're ready to pray. We've been seeking the Lord today and praying over our nation because of all that happened today. The Lord has been warning us that this was going to take place. We pray for the troops, the two victims who are fighting for their lives right now. I don't know if they're still alive or still fighting, but we know that God is able, and we're going to pray for them right now. We're going to pray for their families and pray peace over them, that God would restore their health and that this heinous act will be punished quickly. What the devil meant for bad, God's going to turn around and get the glory for it. I believe with all my heart that's what we're here for. As I was praying this afternoon, I was caught up. He spoke about Saturday; we were praying over Saturday and the 14 people. There are other events, and the Lord said, 'This is what I warned you about. These are the things that I'm warning you about.' It's underground chatter, and the Lord specifically brought this up today. He said, 'The underground chatter, son, for more acts to come.' We are praying against the acts to come over our malls specifically, and the tree-lighting ceremonies and drones. They have brought forth this one act, and you'll hear in just a second more about what's going to happen because of the act that happened today. We pray. This was right by the White House, and President Trump wasn't there, thank God. He was at Mar-a-Lago, and we continued to pray for him and for Vice President Vance. I keep forgetting; you'll have to bear with me. We pray for JD Vance. I know what the Lord is warning me about, and he keeps bringing up that in the days ahead, they will challenge the peace that you have every single day as you go about your normal life. The enemy would try to challenge that so you live in fear and question everything: 'Is it okay to go here? Is it okay to go there?' We take for granted as United States citizens the great job our law enforcement does every single day. Our FBI, our Homeland Security, our local law enforcement, and our sheriff's departments are always out to protect and serve our beautiful nation. The enemy would try to challenge our way of life so that you would feel that insecurity of whether we are safe to go to the mall. That was what the Lord was showing me: the enemy was going to try to instill fear, worry, panic, and dread. As I was praying over that today, I kept praying into Saturday tree-lighting ceremonies and massive get-togethers tomorrow for the parade, praying over New York, Las Vegas, our airports, our TSA, and those who check the baggage. We pray that God would always intervene, that there would be supernatural divine intervention for our nation. That's what we'll continue to pray about tonight. That is what I feel in my heart the Lord is wanting us to keep interceding for. Like I said, stuff like this shouldn't happen. The fact that two troops got almost fatally shot so far is ridiculous. I wanted to say everything is at peace, but we live in a fallen world and things sometimes slip through the cracks. We're going to stand on the blood and our covenant tonight, believing God for the holiday season. In particular, the Lord said Thursday, Friday, and Saturday are three major days. We have work to do, and I believe many people are up for the task. There are 2,000 of you here already; you know the seriousness of the hour. Some of you don't even live in America, but this was not concerning just America. The Lord said, 'You must pray for France, Germany, and all of Europe.' Praying for Australia, New Zealand, and so on. It's interesting—I didn't feel led to pray concerning these terrorist attacks for any Asian nations; it's always the Western nations like Europe and Canada. We'll just do our job. I want to play this video if you're not familiar with today's events. Pete is his name, Hegseth. They're going to bring out more troops, which isn't a coincidence, thank God, because of what I've seen concerning the tree-lighting ceremony. Whenever I've told you about the map with the Lego-like buildings, they were planning and strategizing against our nation's capital. I saw these men, and it was for the underground chatter. I keep seeing these secret networks of phone lines that are coded so they can talk without being interrupted. I believe it's the same thing they had in New York that we discovered around September 21st. The Lord said Chicago, Seattle, and Boston have the same kind of networking as New York. We pray that those be uncovered and brought to light. The Lord said these are the same kind of SIM cards—a very well-funded thing to topple the eagle so that they are able to do what they want to do. They said, 'We must topple the eagle and bring havoc on the inside so we can do what we want with Israel and these other areas.' As America goes, so does the world; we're the watchdogs of the world. Even now, the main vision I saw for 2025 was Trump coming on the scene in January and standing on a conductor's platform like a lion tamer, cracking his whip to the nations. I saw him crack his whip at the bear and the dragon, and they paused. He was bringing peace for a season, while others would try to escalate things and maneuver around his administration, waiting for his term to be over, even considering how they could eliminate him. And the Lord said, "We must pray for President Trump, not just for the physical, but for discernment on who he allows into his inner circle as nations would try to deceive him." He said that he would have great discernment in the days ahead of how to handle doing business. "Don't trust everybody." And the Lord said he needs to work on discernment. Even then, don't just trust people blindly, sir. There are enemies; there are rats within. And the Lord keeps telling me there's rats in the Pentagon. There's rats in the FBI. There's rats in Homeland Security. There's rats in these places. And he said these people are leaking information. He specifically told me this. Now, I don't know if you have found them all yet, but I have prayed continually that you will. I even saw in particular people—the Lord showed me these people are rats. You must pray for them to be exposed and brought to justice. So that's been our prayer. As a family, we pray over that too. And we pray over President Trump continually—about his heart, about his veins—even before anything was brought up on the news. If you go back, we've been praying over his heart, his veins, and his mind for pressure from all the stress from the job. It's a majorly stressful job when you're doing what he's doing. So, we're praying for him and we continue to do that. I'm praying for his marriage, praying for his kids and his grandkids, for Kai in particular concerning Washington DC when she's there. Praying for her, a hedge around and about her. And so, I believe with all my heart our prayers have great traction in them and we're making progress. So, we're going to continue to do that. Let's go over a little bit of what happened last night. If you were here for the almost three-hour video—I told Diana, I said, "Well, the squawkers will squawk, but I tell you, the glory was here, and I didn't want to cut it off." I told her, I said, "When I was seeing over there and that angel came, that was beautiful." When you have those experiences with the Father... She's been crying. I'm telling you, the glory of the Lord—we felt it today. And when the angel said to us, "I've been assigned to you. I have been assigned." Diana and I—Diana's a thinker—were just going over things: Is it Michael? Was that Michael? He didn't say his name. I don't know. But I believe he was an archangel. And he said, "I have been assigned to help you. I've been assigned." And when he was standing there, I thought, "He is a fierce thing." I mean, that angel looked awesome. I've described it to everyone. Braden made the shield. He tried to make the shield the way I described it the best he could. It was his breastplate. He didn't have a shield; he had a sword in one hand and a horn in the other. And I thought that was interesting. It looked like that, but it was turning like a galaxy—not a black hole, but like what you'd see in a Milky Way picture. It was turning like a circle inside of his chest. It was moving; all that was alive. And as it was turning in him, his skin—what you would consider our skin—was opal. And he was turning and making different colors. He was like one of those kaleidoscopes—one of those little things you can look through—and that's the way his skin looked. His face kept changing and he was glistening and glowing. It was fascinating because the Lord allowed me to look; the portal was right here and it opened up and he just stood there. The Lord allowed me to keep looking at him. Usually the visions will change, but the Lord let me just see this angelic being right here, and that was amazing. No, it was not natural. If you have that kind of encounter, you're on your face; the presence of the Lord, when an angelic being like that in physical form comes, is the glory of the Lord. But when you're seeing in spirit, it's filtered for me; you're able to stand it. But when I was looking at him, he kept looking back at me, but he was always keeping his face to the Father. He was looking to the Father. He would glance at us, but he would look at the Father and he kept his eyes to the Father the whole time. It was amazing. He wasn't looking around for demons; he was looking to the Father. His eyes were fixed upon the Lord. And that was the most amazing part of why I kept looking at him. I was like, "Wow, he knows his assignment, but he's waiting for instructions from the Lord as he's watching over my family." And he spoke to me and said, "I'm here on an assignment for you, but I have a word to give you from the Lord." And he spoke and said, "Love never fails." And he said, "Faith works by love." And he said the greater glory what you are looking for is attached to the love walk. What have you done with love? What did you do with love? How do you treat your fellow brother? Love never fails. First Corinthians 13, going over the love walk—the foundational love. God is love. It's not what he does; it's who he is. God is love. And as I saw that angel with that opal, and his sword looked like a lightning bolt. And where he held it had emeralds. He had emeralds inside of that handle that were glowing from the inside out. They weren't like light reflecting off of them; the light was coming from within them. These beautiful emeralds were green and they were massive. And he was holding it, but you could see the green on the side as his hand was on it. And I could see these green beautiful stones that had black onyx on the outside of them lining them. They were set in black onyx with gold. And he was holding the handle. And as the handle went up, it had a handguard that protected his hand, like what you would have on a sword that goes out like this to protect your hand. But there was a lightning bolt—not just any kind of light. It wasn't like a blade like you would see in a normal sword. It was like lightning that was his weapon. It was a lightning bolt; it was like electricity was the blade of his sword. And he was holding it there, but he was standing with his arms out like this. He was ready for action. Most people get tired if we have our arm held up there, but he doesn't get tired. His eyes were fixed upon our Father. In the other hand, he had a horn that had a royalty garment, like a royalty flag, hanging off of the horn. It was gold-outlined and looked like a W with crimson red mixed with purple and gold, and it was gorgeous the way it was dripping. It was fastened to the horn, but he was waiting for instruction. But as he came, he said to me, "I've been instructed today. I've been assigned to you and your family." There was more to what he said, but that was for us. And I'm thankful that God would graciously show us these things. Kaleidoscope. Thank you. You know, Brendan has a hard time with even his own language. Gyroscope, Kaleidoscope. They sound the same a little bit. But all glory to Jesus. As we were praying, I kept seeing him, and he was here. And then what was the next part? Heaven is invading earth. Yes, Heaven is invading earth. I saw the universe and the stars that were thrown into space. But as he was there, I could see it. Oh, and then I heard regarding the great Babylon, I saw a storm coming again. And he said, "A major storm is coming. A major storm is coming." I saw Babylon. And most people say, "Well, it's Rome." No, again, it was New York. It was referencing New York. And that's what I was seeing. You say, "Well, the 12 major hills and all that," and people try to argue there. And if you go to—is his name Brewer? He has the YouTube channel. He has the beard and he is a Baptist minister. Yes, Troy Brewer? He teaches end-time stuff a lot and he's on there a lot. He even talks about New York being Mystery Babylon and he can prove it; he shows the map and the hills and everything, and it goes alongside it because when you're hearing stuff and you think, "Lord, does this line up with the word?" you don't want to go off into flakyville. You want to stay grounded. Just because you see it doesn't mean it's—you need to make sure it's not flaky. But as I was seeing it over, I told D, "It's been glorious." That was wonderful. We are so excited about it. And then she read Revelation 18 and what the Lord was saying about the Mystery of Babylon. So I think that was it. No, the dragon. Oh, I saw a dragon. See, Braden, you're awesome. I saw the dragon. Okay, so I saw a cliff. Robert Breaker teaches a lot of cool stuff. I'm telling you, that guy's sharp. I like to look at his stuff when he has the chart and his little dry-erase board and he does all this stuff. I think it's cool, man. I get into that. It keeps me entertained. But he's pretty sharp. What was I telling you? Dragon. Okay. The dragon was on the side of this hill. And as it opened its mouth, it was in the rocks. It was hidden in the rocks this whole time. And as it opened its mouth, the rocks became a dragon. And it opened its mouth and the water started to come inside of that dragon's mouth. And all of a sudden I saw amber—like the tree sap that's hardened. It was in a circle and the dragon's claw out of his hand grabbed a hold of that and was holding it, and I saw things moving around in it. Now that looked very occultic, like a cult, like satanic. And so I thought that was interesting because it was concerning the water. It was right after Mystery Babylon and the dragon opened its mouth and the water came out; it was breathing on the water. There was something going on with the water and I thought that was interesting. I could see the mist and all the stuff rolling around it and I thought, "What in the world?" And so maybe that's Wormwood. I don't know folks. I just tell you what I see and I go, "Hey, that was way out there." But that dragon became alive out of the rocks, opened its mouth, and gobbled up the water out of the ocean. And as it came forth out of him, it was steaming. It was like it was bubbling. And then the amber—there was something with it—his hand came on this thing and this dragon grabbed a hold of this and I thought, "What in the world?" So as I was seeing this angel, I keep getting, I believe, glimpses of Tribulation and chapters in Revelation. Even with the four angels before, that was last week. Where are we in the end times? Jesus is coming. And bottom line, I keep going over it and over it. We talk about it and what the Lord brings to us every time, and we're so grateful. Isn't it exciting? It's exciting to be alive. It's exciting to follow Jesus right now. If you are not excited about the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ, your wood is wet. It is time to have anticipation, looking for our Creator. I'm telling you folks, we are in the last of the last seconds of the last of the last days here. And as I was looking over, I saw—no, the Lord said, "Leave it alone." So, that's basically it. Praise the Lord. So, I don't know if you were here for it, but those were basically the highlights. So, people say, "Brandon, I don't have time to spend two hours." I know. I wouldn't either, but this is what the Lord's assigned me to do. So, we give you the last half of the video if you want to watch it and pray a little bit and you say, "Hey, I don't have time." This is the CliffsNotes. You know, the little yellow book. The CliffsNotes version of what we said. So, you just got it in 22 minutes instead of three hours. But you don't just jump in the river, folks. It's cultivation. Cultivation, acceleration. It is not a microwave. It is a slow cooker. You don't just say, "Well, you know, God, that's just the way it is." People get cranky about it, but it's cultivation. It's prayer and prayer and prayer. And that's cutting all the pauses. That's everything. Boop. There you go. So maybe that saved you a lot of time so you can go eat some more turkey, all glory to Jesus. But we're going to pray now and we're going to seek the Lord concerning our nation and praying over Black Friday and all the things that the Lord has assigned us to do. Are you ready? Do you need to take a break? I got you tea. I like the raw version. Well, I don't feel an anointing on it like telling you all that. To me, the pauses are the pauses and the anointing and the presence of the Lord when it fills your house is what I'm after. Everything else, I don't care about that. It's about him. When you get lost in him, it's like D and I talk about it when we were talking about being contenders but being the next generations. We have our friend Billy. I say he's like a unicorn. You don't have very many of these men that are walking in the presence of the Lord that you go to their services and it's life-changing like you do when we go visit Billy Burke. I love my friend. I pray over that man every day that he's going to live to 120. Lord, keep him around. But there's these elders that have gone home and I said, "Lord, why did it stop? Why did the healing movement really die?" There are some people and we see some healings, but I want the Jack Coe and the Oral Roberts and the tent revivals are coming back. The Lord keeps telling me, Brandon, that tent revivals are coming back. The old well of revival is coming uncapped. But you are not going to just walk up and get a cupful of it like Kenneth Hagin did and the ones who went before you who drank, walked away, and had their cup full. He said, "I'm taking you to the bottom of it. You're going to go to the bottom of the well this time, for this generation is the grand finale." You'll go to the bottom of the well this time, and this will be the greatest outpouring of my spirit and my presence upon this world that the world has ever seen or known. The former and the latter rain together with a major move—I'm talking about a glorious outpouring like we've never seen before. The well of revival is coming uncapped. And He said Oral Roberts University on Lewis Avenue is about to experience a glorious move of God's presence. There will be moves in Collinsville and all over the place. The Lord has spoken even to John Kilpatrick a couple of days ago at Church of His Presence and Perry Stone. These churches the Lord keeps bringing up, along with Living Word—you can go on and on—but I'm telling you, He said there is going to be one last major push. As we are praying into the greats of the old, the Lord said, "Be the trendsetter of this generation. Be the trendsetter of this generation." That's what I told y'all. He said, "Brandon, you're only operating at 25% of your gifting. Only 25%." And that's when I stopped and I said, "Lord, how is that? I'm getting older. You know, I'm not old, but I'm getting older." I said, "I want more. I want more." He said, "It's time. T-I-M-E. How much time do you spend? How much do you die to self daily? How much do you obey? It's by obedience, listening, praying, and obeying." And that's why I went over the things I said yesterday about how you are looking for the major things for the major decisions—the big thing, the move maybe to Florida or the move to California or the move to Central America or whatever—and you're thinking that's the big moment. Go to Bible school; this is it. But He said it's the small decisions. It's the obedience for the day-to-day, the mundane. It's the mundane. It's the day-to-day that gets you from glory to glory. You're looking for the major thing, but I'm looking at the small thing. And that's what He's talking about for these greats: they obeyed me in the small things because I listened to them. I go back onto YouTube and I think, "Was there a sermon that was really great?" Yeah, but some of these sermons, I was going, "So what?" And I don't mean disrespect; I'm just being real because I'm looking. So what? But there was obedience behind what He asked them to do through persecution. They were trailblazers. And the Lord said, "Be a trailblazer. Say the things that I tell you to say. Be obedient when I tell you to do what to do. Speak the hard things. Do it and you'll stand out from it, even if you stand alone. Do what I've told you." There will be great people coming out of seemingly nothing in the days ahead, and you're going to look at them and say, "Where did these people come from?" Be trailblazers and be that person that God's called you to be in this end-time army. Be the salt. Be the light. Show Jesus to people when you go into the marketplace, when you go to Walmart, or wherever you are in your local community. Show Jesus this holiday season. I heard one preacher say, "The only Jesus people will see is the Jesus in you and the Jesus in me." And I refuse to be a stumbling block for somebody. I want them, when they see me, to say, "There's something different about you." When we have people come to our house to work on it, they go, "Man, there's a peace here. There's something different. I want that." Holy Spirit, invade my home. Fill my cup to overflowing, Father. None of me and all of You. I just want you to keep fanning that flame. And the other part of last night was, "Don't give up on your marriage." The Lord was saying there are so many people ready to have a divorce, and He said, "Don't give up on your marriage. Don't give up on where we are right now." Father, we thank You for the body. Lord, we just thank You for all that You provided for us for this Thanksgiving tomorrow. Father, there's so much we can be thankful for as a nation. We're so thankful, Father, as we celebrate this wonderful time of the year that celebrates Your Son. We give You the month of Christmas. We give You that timeframe. We choose to make Jesus the reason for the season. We choose to look at You and go, "God, happy birthday, Jesus," regardless of if it was really Your birthday or not, but this is a time I set apart for my family. And we just say, "God, we want to give You the glory." We give You all the honor and we give You all the praise for this beautiful Christmas season, for Jesus is the reason for the season. As we enter into that as of tomorrow, we give this time to You. We separate our year; we're giving our 10%. We're giving that timeframe of saying, "Jesus, this is our tithe." We're giving more honor to You to say, "Jesus, we love You." Our first fruits for going into 2026. Jesus, we love You. You're the reason for the season. We give You all the glory, honor, and praise for all that You've done and all that You continue to do. Thank You for the year that we had, that we're still alive. We still have air in our lungs. We still have health. You've given us a car. We've got a place to live. We've got a roof over our heads. Father, You've done so much. We paid our bills on time. We paid our electric on time. Father, You were so faithful. We had food to eat. Father, we have shoes and clothes to put on our bodies. You've been so good to us, Lord. Thank You, Lord. Father, our family is born again and they love You. Father, there are some people whose loved ones departed this year, and they're not here anymore, and they're celebrating the holidays and this Thanksgiving alone. Lord, we know that time is coming short, that You're coming back for us and we'll be reunited with our loved ones who went home. And we're so grateful, Father, that this isn't the end, that there is a new beginning coming. There's a new beginning, a new day. And I thank You, Father, that though that day is drawing nigh, it's coming. And we're so grateful, Father, that this could be the last Thanksgiving that we have. This could be the last Christmas we have on this earth—not because of death, but because Your Son is coming soon. I believe we'll all live long and finish strong, and we'll be that generation that does not taste death, that we will be in the rapture of the church. Your Son's return is at hand. This could be the last Christmas; this could be the last Thanksgiving. Nobody knows the day or the hour. But Father, we are always looking to You. And we just want to say thank You as we lift up this body and we lift up this time of communion and fellowship with You. We lift it up and we say, "God, you've been so good to me. Thank you, Lord, for all that you provided. Thank you, Lord, that we're healthy. Thank you, Lord, that we're mentally sound. Thank you, Lord, Father, that you took all this on the cross for us. And, Father, we may not have the full manifestation of what we're believing for in some areas, but God, you are able and it is done. And we receive it. We worship you and we give you praise for the finished work of Jesus Christ. We take this body right now in the name of Jesus. Amen and amen. Lord, we take the blood and we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We apply the blood of Jesus over us and we just come before your throne boldly. And if there's anything you want to show us, if there's anything you have need for us to see, we're an open vessel to see it. I pray over my mind. I speak that you would speak through my vocal cords and think through my mind. None of me and all of you in Jesus' name. Uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I plead the blood over us. I plead the blood over my eyes that I see what you need me to see. And if there is not anything, that's fine. We're not here for performance. We're not into performance. Performance is not of you anyway. It's pride. We go vertical and we attract to deflect like we've been taught. We keep our eyes on you, Father. And we take the blood right now in Jesus' mighty name. And we thank you, Lord, for the blood that covers Diana and me and our sins. Amen and amen. I'm too long-winded. Father, we just give you praise here. Open the eyes of our heart, Lord. We want to see you. Is there anything you need for us to do for you, Father, concerning this week? I know what you've said to me already, and I know we could jump right in that river, but I want to be like you, and you're a gentleman, and you don't force anything. You dance, you lead, and we follow. We dance with you as you lead the dance in this beautiful prayer time, and I'm not in a hurry. Father, I'm with you, and Diana and I are so grateful for this time. Thank you, Father. Lord, you are more precious than silver. Lord, you are more costly than gold. We wait on you. What a beautiful name it is, the name of Jesus Christ our King. Nothing can compare to this. What a beautiful name it is, the name of Jesus. Thank you, Father. Where do you want us to go right now? I want to follow you, Holy Spirit. We're so grateful. I exalt thee, O Lord, for thou, O Lord, art high above all the earth. Thou art exalted far above, O God. When you get real with God, God will become real with you. Stop being so religious. Get real with the Father. He knows what you're thinking before you think it. He knows what you're going to say before you say it. So he knows when you're ticked off about life and you're upset about things. And he knows your heart towards him whether you trust him or you don't. There's nothing you're going to hide from him. So just get real with him and say, 'God, I'm ticked off about this stuff and I need you to help me.' Versus trying to hide it and going, 'Everything's okay' when you're not okay. 'God, I'm hurting inside. I need you to fix it.' And I think a lot of times when you get real with God, God will get real with you. He becomes real to you and your relationships will grow. Don't be fake. I try to practice that all the time. And he comes and visits, doesn't he, baby? Jesus. There's just something about your name, Master, Savior, Jesus, like a fragrance after the rain.
